    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., specific numeric placeholders).",

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies a load-bearing internal contradiction and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., specific numeric placeholders).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., ambiguous 14% headline).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not.
